metadata.description: Quantum hardware systems database. This file is the single source of truth for README.md generation.

systems.notes: Partnership with Microsoft for Magne (50 logical qubits by end 2026)
Condor (1121q) for scale; Heron r2/r3 (156q) flagship for performance. Nighthawk (120q, square topology) announced Nov 2025. Kookaburra (4158q multi-chip) planned 2026
200-qubit systems deployed at Aramco (SAU), Julich (DEU), CEA (FRA). Targeting 1000 physical qubits by end 2025, 10000 by 2026
Aurora: world's first modular photonic QC (4 networked racks, 35 chips, 13km fiber). Borealis (216 modes) was previous gen. Targeting quantum data center by 2029. DARPA QBI Stage B
Helios launched Nov 2025. 99.9975% 1Q fidelity, 99.921% 2Q fidelity. Sol (192q) planned 2027, Apollo (1000s q, fault-tolerant) planned 2029
Willow (Dec 2024): 105 qubits, first below-threshold QEC. Oct 2025: first verifiable quantum advantage via Quantum Echoes algorithm. Previous: Sycamore (53q)
Tempo: 100 qubits, #AQ 64 (achieved 3 months early). Forte Enterprise: #AQ 36 (commercial). 99.99% 2Q gate fidelity (Oct 2025 record). Acquiring Oxford Ionics. 256q planned 2026
Omega photonic chipset announced. $1B Series E (2025), $7B valuation. Building sites in Chicago and Brisbane. Manufacturing at GlobalFoundries Fab 8
3000+ physical qubits, 30 logical qubits (2025). Targeting 10000 physical / 100 logical qubits by 2026. $230M+ raised in 2025
100-qubit demonstrator targeted spring 2027. MAQCS project: 1000-qubit system at LRZ by ~2027. Uses strontium atoms
20, 54, and 150-qubit systems available. 99.51% median 2Q CZ fidelity on 20q. 150q to Finland 2026, 300q planned 2027. 54q deployed at Julich (EuroHPC)
Ankaa-3: 84q, 99.5% median 2Q fidelity. Modular 36q system with 99.5% fidelity (2x error reduction). 100+ qubits by end 2025, 150+ by end 2026
11-qubit processor: 99.99% 1Q fidelity, 99.9% 2Q fidelity. 250000 qubit registers patterned in 8 hours. DARPA QBI Stage B. Quantum Twins launched Feb 2026
T-centre silicon spin-photon qubits. $180M CAD raised. DARPA QBI Stage B. Targeting fault-tolerant QC by ~2028
Delivered first full-stack silicon CMOS quantum computer to UK NQCC (Sep 2025). Uses standard 300mm silicon wafers. DARPA QBI Stage B. SiQEC: fault-tolerant unit cell by ~2026
Advantage2 (4400+ qubits, Zephyr topology) GA May 2025. Advantage (5000+, Pegasus). Planning gate-model system in 2026
EUR 15M Series A (Jul 2025). First universal photonic QC (8 qubits) planned 2026, 64-qubit in 2027. Silicon-nitride chips, room temperature
72 functional qubits + 126 coupler qubits. 20M+ global visits, deployed at multiple sites. Open-source Origin Pilot OS released Feb 2026
PINE Q1: QV 128, rack-mounted. IBEX Q1: 12q on AWS Braket, 24-qubit entanglement world record. PINE SET-UP: up to 50 qubits. MILLENION project: 1000q target
Delivered QUARTET to UK NQCC (Aug 2025). EQC technology (electronics, not lasers). Being acquired by IonQ (announced Jun 2025)
Lucy (12q) delivered to EuroHPC at CEA TGCC. Canopus (24q) planned. Available on OVHcloud mid-2026. 20000x simulation speedup with NVIDIA CUDA-Q
Up to 30-qubit pilot system at Julich (2025). MAGIC technology: microwave-based ion control (no lasers). WEF Technology Pioneer 2025. FullStaQD software stack partner
PT-2: ~90 photonic qubits, shipping since early 2025. Deployed at UK NQCC, Montana State. PT-3 planned 2026. Room-temperature photonic system
Room-temperature NV-center diamond quantum accelerators
Shut down quantum research lab Jan 2024. Equipment donated to Beijing Academy of Quantum Information Sciences
Shut down quantum research lab Nov 2023. Equipment donated to Zhejiang University
Desktop NMR quantum computers for education. Room temperature operation
